fields.label: API Token
fields.helpText: Generate via `flyctl tokens create org` or at fly.io/dashboard -> Account -> Access Tokens

healthcheck_config.description: Validates token via Machines API apps list

metadata.summary: Fly.io global application platform for running containerized apps close to users.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Install flyctl and run `flyctl auth login`
2. Create a token: `flyctl tokens create org`
3. Copy the fo1_... value and paste here
